summary.en: Full Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years building scalable microservices and backend systems across fintech and enterprise domains. Proficient in .NET Core, Golang, and cloud-native platforms (Azure, Oracle Cloud); CKAD-certified with a meticulous approach to clean, test-driven developer. Has spoken at GDG Kaohsiung on Golang and Coding-Tools topics.

details.en: Leading Asia-region service integration for a global vehicle care platform using .NET Core.

achievements.en: Built cross-regional .NET Core services supporting Asia-market business operations

details.en: Migrated a loan platform to Micro Services; established cloud-native infrastructure on Oracle Cloud.

achievements.en: Migrated credit loan system from Monolithic Architecture to Micro Services Architecture, reducing deployment coupling
Decoupled business rules from loan processing logic via strategy module redesign
Implemented SSO/OAuth for unified authentication across multiple internal services
Automated CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps, reducing manual deployment effort
Deployed production services on Oracle Cloud (OCP), establishing cloud-native infra

details.en: Developed payment processing and third-party API integrations; championed TDD, hexagonal architecture, and DevOps practices.

achievements.en: Led intern team as Scrum Master, running workshops on hexagonal architecture and TDD
Delivered Docker and Kubernetes workshops, upskilling the team on container deployments
Set up ELK stack monitoring for Kubernetes services, improving distributed observability
Refactored legacy codebase and resolved 2+ year-old production bugs
Spoke at GDG Kaohsiung twice on Golang Discord bots and Vim IDE configuration

education.title: Master of Computer Science
education.sub_title: National Yunlin University of Science and Technology, YunTech

details.en: Researched Blockchain and Network Security; thesis on a secure encryption scheme called Chameleon Hash.

education.title: Bachelor of Information and Telecommunication Engineering

details.en: Focused on Blockchain and Network Security research.
